name: cloth folding 2
description: Interactive coaching course for cloth folding 2 compiled in real-time from webcam footage.

steps.name: Displaying and Aligning the Cloth
steps.description: Hold the square blue cloth by its top two corners, ensuring it is fully unfolded, flat, and free of wrinkles before beginning the folding process.

checklist.description: The cloth is held up straight, fully spread out, with no visible folds or creases.

failure_conditions.trigger_description: Holding the cloth unevenly or letting it sag in the middle.
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Pull your hands slightly apart to create gentle tension, keeping the top edge straight and level.

steps.name: Creating the First Diagonal Fold
steps.description: Bring two diagonally opposite corners of the square cloth together to fold it in half, creating a clean triangular shape. Hold the joined corners firmly to keep the fold secure.

checklist.description: Verify that the cloth forms a neat triangle with the edges aligned and no major wrinkles or overlapping mismatches.

failure_conditions.trigger_description: Misaligned corners or uneven edges that distort the triangular shape.
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: If the edges do not line up, release the corners, flatten the cloth, and carefully bring the opposite corners together again, smoothing the fold from the center outward.

steps.name: Creating the Second Diagonal Fold
steps.description: Fold the triangular cloth in half once more by bringing the two remaining base corners together, forming a smaller, thicker triangle.

checklist.description: Verify that the cloth is now a neat, smaller triangle with all edges aligned and no loose corners sticking out.

failure_conditions.trigger_description: The corners may misalign, causing the triangle to become asymmetrical or uneven.
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Carefully align the base corners before pressing down on the fold, smoothing out any wrinkles from the center outwards.
